eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cass, MN; at 8:17 PM on MAR 19, 2019 Effective until 8:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Office. This in only a test. This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Office. This in only a test.
